title: October 3
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|October}}
'''October 3''' is the 276th day of the year (277th in leap years). There are 89 days remaining in the year.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1959|1959]] – [[Greg Proops]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[Greig Fraser]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 84|''Star Wars Weekly'' 84]] published.
*[[1983]] – ''[[A New Beginning]]'' serial begins at the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]].
*[[1986]] – [[Joonas Suotamo]] is born.
*[[1987]] – [[Mousy McCallum]] is born.
*[[1995]] – [[Heir to the Empire 1|''Heir to the Empire'' 1]] published.
*[[2000]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]'' published.
*[[2001]] – [[Tag & Bink Are Dead 1|''Tag & Bink Are Dead'' 1]] published.
*[[2008]] – "[[Ambush]]" and "[[Rising Malevolence|Rising ''Malevolence'']]" air on [[Cartoon Network]], premiering ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]''.
*[[2011]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars Character Encyclopedia]]'' published.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Clone Wars Volume 2: The Enemy on All Sides]]'' published.
*[[2013]] – ''[[So Uncivilized: Great Gunslingers in Star Wars]] Part 2'' released on [[StarWars.com]].
*[[2014]] – ''[[Star Wars Rebels: Spark of Rebellion]]'' airs on the [[Disney Channel]].
*[[2017]] – ''[[William Shakespeare's The Force Doth Awaken: Star Wars Part the Seventh]]'' published.
*2017 – ''[[Forces of Destiny: Daring Adventures: Volume 2]]'' published.
*2017 – "[[Teach You, I Will]]" airs on YouTube.
*2017 – ''[[From a Certain Point of View]]'' published.
*2017 – [[From a Certain Point of View (audiobook)|''From a Certain Point of View'' audiobook]] released.
*2017 – ''[[Star Wars Coding Projects]]'' published.
*[[2018]] – 10th anniversary of ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]''.
*2018 – [[Star Wars (2015) 55|''Star Wars'' (2015) 55]] published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars Adventures: Tales from Vader's Castle 1|''Star Wars Adventures: Tales from Vader's Castle'' 1]] published.
*[[2019]] – ''[[Star Wars: Be More Leia]]'' published.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Queen's Hope]]'' reprinted in paperback.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars: Galaxy of Stickers: The Dark Side]]'' published.
*2023 – "[[Part Eight: The Jedi, the Witch, and the Warlord]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
